name: skillsdeck
description: skillsdeck — an open-source, community-driven catalog of Agent Skills for AI coding agents across all domains.

plugins.name: code-comments
plugins.description: Comment only where a senior dev would need more than two glances; default to none.

plugins.name: laravel-services-support
plugins.description: Laravel: external integrations live in app/Services, internal abstractions in app/Support.

plugins.name: no-ai-attribution
plugins.description: Keep AI attribution (Co-Authored-By, "Generated with" footers) out of git commits and pull requests.

plugins.name: project-conventions
plugins.description: House rules for a Laravel + Inertia + React app: component reuse-first, mandatory tests, type locations.

plugins.name: tighten-prose
plugins.description: Tighten prose by cutting filler, hedging, and redundancy without changing meaning or voice.

plugins.name: uat-tdd-e2e
plugins.description: Implement a feature in one pass: write a UAT, drive it with TDD, validate end-to-end, then report.
